title: Lively Kenyan Rice Noodles Crumble
description: A sweet, crumbly festive treat featuring rice noodles, honey, and candied coconut, perfect for celebrations.
instructions: Rinse the rice noodles in cold water and soak them in warm water for 10 minutes until just softened.
Drain the noodles and set them aside.
Melt the ghee in a saucepan over medium heat, add sugar and honey, and stir until the mixture turns light amber.
Add the soaked noodles to the saucepan, tossing to coat them evenly with the syrup.
Stir in the candied coconut flakes, raisins, sesame seeds, poppy seeds, and ground cardamom, cooking for three more minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat, then stir in lime zest and a pinch of salt.
Spread the noodle crumble onto a parchment-lined baking sheet and allow it to cool to room temperature.
Break the cooled mixture into bite-sized crumbs and sprinkle with extra sesame or poppy seeds if desired.
Serve the crumble as a festive dessert or snack garnish.
